expectations.evidence: Shows 'npm install -D playwright-chromium' and 'pnpm add -D playwright-chromium' with devDependency flag
Explicitly explains 'TTY(pseudo-terminal) 요구' and that Claude Code Bash doesn't provide a TTY, causing the server to die in 2-3 seconds
Provides 'script -q /dev/null npx slidev --port 3030 > /tmp/slidev.log 2>&1 &' with detailed explanation table
Shows curl polling loop with 'curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}"' checking for HTTP 200, 1s intervals, 30 retries
Explains 128 + 15 (SIGTERM) = 143 and states it is normal behavior, not an error
Explicitly lists failing patterns: plain '&', 'nohup', '< /dev/null &', 'setsid', and 'run_in_background: true' with explanations of why each fails
